schemes.name: MGNREGS (MNREGA)
schemes.benefit: 100 days guaranteed wage employment per year (Rs 220-350/day)
schemes.eligibility: Rural adult household members willing to do unskilled work

schemes.name: PM Mudra Yojana
schemes.benefit: Collateral-free business loans: Shishu (Rs 50K), Kishore (Rs 5L), Tarun (Rs 10L)

schemes.name: PM SVANidhi
schemes.benefit: Working capital loans Rs 10K → Rs 20K → Rs 50K for street vendors

schemes.name: Startup India Seed Fund
schemes.benefit: Up to Rs 50 lakh for proof of concept + Rs 5 crore for further scaling

schemes.name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana 4.0
schemes.benefit: Free skill training + certification + Rs 8000 reward

schemes.name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
schemes.benefit: Government pays 25% of stipend (max Rs 1500/month) to apprentices

schemes.name: PM Employment Generation Programme
schemes.benefit: 35% (rural) / 25% (urban) subsidy on project cost for new units
schemes.eligibility: Any individual 18+ with Class 8 pass for projects > Rs 10 lakh

schemes.name: Rozgar Mela (PM's Employment Fair)
schemes.benefit: Government job appointment letters issued at mega fairs

schemes.name: Atal Beemit Vyakti Kalyan Yojana
schemes.benefit: 50% of average daily wages for 90 days during unemployment
schemes.eligibility: ESIC-insured workers who lost jobs involuntarily

schemes.name: Nai Manzil Scheme
schemes.benefit: Skill training + bridge education for school-dropout minority youth
schemes.eligibility: Minority community youth 17-35 years, school dropouts

schemes.name: USTTAD (Upgrading Skills)
schemes.benefit: Training in traditional arts/crafts for minority artisans

schemes.name: National Career Service Portal
schemes.benefit: Free job matching, career counselling, internships

schemes.name: PM Daksh (Skill Training for SC/OBC)
schemes.benefit: Free skill training with stipend for SC/OBC/EBC youth

schemes.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
schemes.benefit: Free residential skill training + guaranteed placement
